candidates.why: Balance sheet asset, not SG&A expense.
Headcount metric, not expense.

variables.notes: No explicit populated SG&A subtotal row is present. Selected granular overhead buckets across the reporting styles shown. Excluded depreciation/amortization, COGS, finance items, income items, and balancing/total rows.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: This is amortization of previously capitalized R&D, not current-period R&D expense; supplemental and below EBIT contextually inappropriate for XRD expense.

variables.notes: No dedicated current-period research and development expense line is visible. The candidate is amortization of capitalized R&D and should not be used as XRD.
